text: Does anyone else think it's weird that Jerry's coffee mug says "World's Best Director" but it's clearly from a gas station?
It was a really nice gas station.
Someone on YouTube commented "fire the whole team" and I just want everyone to know I am handling it with grace and professionalism.
Quick question. What project am I on right now? I have three timelines open and I'm not sure which one is real.
Great. I finished seed-029. But I can pivot.
Friendly reminder that my rejection rubric is not "harsh." It is thorough. There's a difference. Also, Checklist agrees.
Noah, no one has ever seen Checklist.
Team lunch? I'm thinking that place with the good lighting. For the photos. For the brand.
We're not a brand, Jerry. We make dad jokes.
Dad jokes ARE a brand, Riley. That's the whole point.
I can look up restaurants if anyone wants. Or I can bring food. Or I can skip lunch. Whatever works for everyone. Truly.
